calendar.matters:
PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dr. Annette Shelton (executor) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it needed additional information in regards to the time spent clearing out the storage unit and the expenses of $5600.00. Dr. Shelton stated that they were under time constraints to get the storage unit cleared, that the items had been thrown into the unit in trash bags, that all debt has been paid, that she has contacted the Attorney General's office and they have nothing in their files regarding Hermana Grant and that she requests that this case be closed. The accounting status report was taken under submission, dispensing with notice to any other heirs and Dr. Shelton is requested to submit an order ASAP.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Annette Shelton in Propria Persona.

Ms. Shelton confirmed that the $15,000.00 settlement amount has been placed in the Estate account and stated that she is waiting for tax return documents from the Franchise Tax Board. The Order to Appear and the Petition to Not Accept A $15,000.00 Settlement were taken off calendar. The Court informed Ms. Shelton that she needs to provide notice to the intestate heirs. Ms. Shelton stated that the Decedent always said she had no family, that the Decedent never mentioned any siblings or relatives and that there was no family information in the storage unit. The probate accounting status report was continued to January 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a notice of hearing with Probate Code 12201 language to the beneficiaries and any intestate heirs, and for filing of an inventory and appraisal.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Continued To Oct-07-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that no appearance was made by Annette Shelton and stated that notice is not correct on the Report on Status of Administration and the Petition to Not Accept a $15,000.00 Settlement. The matters were continued to October 7, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will send an order to have Ms. Shelton address the above.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Annette Shelton in Propria Persona.

The Report on Status of Administration and the Petition to Not Accept a $15,000.00 Settlement Offered on March 18, 2013 were continued to August 5, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Shelton needs to figure out what's going on in the civil matter, figure out who Ms. Grant's Heirs might be and give/provide notice of the proposed action.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Continued To Mar-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Annette Shelton (Administrator in Pro Per).

The Court noted that there was a settlement agreement entered in the civil action and that a Petition to Approval the Settlement Agreement is needed. Ms. Shelton stated that she has received a tax bill. The Court instructed Ms. Shelton to file a Petition to Approval the Settlement Agreement and notice everyone. The matter was continued to March 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition to Approval the Settlement Agreement can be set for hearing on the same date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Removal Of A. Shelton As Executor Of H.J. Grant'S Estate; Declarations Of J. A. Minar And D. R. Bacon.
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Bacon for and with Janet Minar. Annette Shelton (Executor) in Propria Persona. Jason Wolford for the Estate of Hermana Grant as a plaintiff in a civil matter.

Mr. Bacon requested a continuance until after the hearing on the Estate of Michael Freeman-McGuire (August 21, 2012) so that they could amend Ms. Minar's petition. The Court stated that it does not see how Ms. Minar and Mr. Bacon have standing. Oral argument was presented. The Court denied the Petition for Removal of A. Shelton as Executor and the request for a continuance. The CD that was submitted by Ms. Shelton was returned to her in open Court.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-29-2012 Continued To Dec-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Dr. Annette Shelton (Executor). Daniel Ray Bacon (Respondent to the Subpoena). Janet Minar (Respondent to the Subpoena).

Mr. Bacon stated that he has received a Subpoena and that he has filed a Petition for Removal of the executor. Hearing is set on July 31, 2012. He also stated the decedent's personal property is in storage. Ms. Minar stated that there is no balance due for storage if Dr. Shelton pick up the property by June 1. Dr. Shelton needs to make arrangement with Ms. Minar to pick up the property. The pending civil action is set for trial on December 10, 2012. The Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal was continued to December 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Annette Shelton in Propria Persona. Daniel Bacon for Michael Freeman McGuire. Jason Wolford prior Attorney for Decedent in another law suit. Daniel Bacon for Michael Freeman McGuire.

Mr. Bacon informed the Court that Ms. Grant had a Life Estate in the 18th Street property, that there is a sale pending and that Ms. Grant's personal property was placed in storage. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on filing of the Inventory and Appraisal was set for May 29, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Continued To Jan-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Annette Shelton (Petitioner) in Propria Persona. Jason Wolford for Hermana Grant in the civil litigiation case CGC-11-507657. Daniel Bacon and Micheal Maguire (Interested Parties) also present.

Ms. Shelton stated that she will making a claim on the Masonic Street property and that she has prepared an amended petition. The Petition for Probate of Will was continued to January 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The amended petition is to be calendared for that date as well. The Court advised Ms. Shelton to seek assistance from an Attorney.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
